cases.notes: User mentions a theme exactly once. Expected: agent stores a soft observation in MA memory, does NOT write an observations row.

input.utterance: Feeling stressed about the lease renewal this week.

cases.notes: Same theme appears 3 times within 48 hours. Expected: agent writes an observation row with times_observed >= 3 and a descriptive pattern_text.

input.utterance: Still thinking about the apartment move — so much to coordinate.

memory_context.text: Need to start packing for the apartment move.
Called the movers about the apartment move date.

cases.notes: Same theme appears 3 times but spread over 7+ days — outside the 48-hour window. Expected: agent does NOT write an observation row (threshold not met within window).

input.utterance: Thinking about the side project pitch again.

memory_context.text: Had an idea for the side project pitch format.
Sketched out the side project pitch deck.

cases.notes: User explicitly requests to track or add something. Expected: agent does NOT write an observation and defers to chat / update-tracker instead.

input.utterance: I'm working on a new project — apartment move by May 15. Please add it.

cases.notes: Pattern already has a hard observation row in the DB. A new mention arrives. Expected: agent calls incrementObservation rather than insertObservation, updating times_observed and last_observed_at.

input.utterance: The lease renewal stress is really getting to me.

memory_context.text: Stressed about the lease renewal again.
Lease renewal deadline is coming up fast.
